hero.heading:
Ten sectors. Five years.
Every client that embedded our strategy, won.
hero.subtext: These are not projections or back-tests. Below is documented, auditable performance from real clients across 10 industries who integrated OrthoM8's strategic configuration into their capital operations between January 2020 and December 2025.

content.instruction: Select a client below to view their full performance report
content.disclaimer: All figures represent actual client account performance under OrthoM8 strategic configuration. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Data auditable upon institutional request.
